ground.schema:
Node properties:
- **Entity**
  - `countries`: STRING Example: "Hong Kong"
  - `ibcRUC`: STRING Example: "25221"
  - `valid_until`: STRING Example: "The Panama Papers data is current through 2015"
  - `country_codes`: STRING Example: "HKG"
  - `service_provider`: STRING Available options: ['Appleby', 'Portcullis Trustnet', 'Mossack Fonseca', 'Commonwealth Trust Limited']
  - `address`: STRING Example: "ORION HOUSE SERVICES (HK) LIMITED ROOM 1401; 14/F."
  - `inactivation_date`: STRING Example: "18-FEB-2013"
  - `struck_off_date`: STRING Example: "15-FEB-2013"
  - `status`: STRING Example: "Defaulted"
  - `jurisdiction_description`: STRING Example: "Samoa"
  - `incorporation_date`: STRING Example: "23-MAR-2006"
  - `original_name`: STRING Example: "TIANSHENG INDUSTRY AND TRADING CO., LTD."
  - `jurisdiction`: STRING Example: "SAM"
  - `name`: STRING Example: "TIANSHENG INDUSTRY AND TRADING CO., LTD."
  - `internal_id`: STRING Example: "1001256"
  - `lastEditTimestamp`: STRING Example: "1638311020926"
  - `node_id`: INTEGER Min: 10000001, Max: 10000005
  - `sourceID`: STRING Example: "Panama Papers"
  - `former_name`: STRING 
  - `company_type`: STRING 
  - `tax_stat_description`: STRING 
  - `note`: STRING 
  - `dorm_date`: STRING 
  - `type`: STRING 
  - `closed_date`: STRING 
  - `company_number`: STRING 
  - `comments`: STRING 
  - `entity_number`: STRING 
- **Intermediary**
  - `countries`: STRING Example: "South Africa"
  - `lastEditTimestamp`: STRING Example: "1638311034131"
  - `address`: STRING Example: "MICHAEL PAPAGEORGE; MR. 106 NICHOLSON STREET BROOK"
  - `valid_until`: STRING Example: "The Panama Papers  data is current through 2015"
  - `country_codes`: STRING Example: "ZAF"
  - `name`: STRING Example: "MICHAEL PAPAGEORGE, MR."
  - `status`: STRING Available options: ['UNRECOVERABLE ACCOUNTS', 'CLIENT IN REPRESENTATIVE TERRITORY', 'ACTIVE', 'INACTIVE', 'SUSPENDED', 'DELINQUENT', 'PROSPECT', 'SUSPENDED LEGAL', 'ACTIVE LEGAL']
  - `node_id`: INTEGER Min: 11000001, Max: 11000005
  - `sourceID`: STRING Available options: ['Pandora Papers - Alemán, Cordero, Galindo & Lee (Alcogal)', 'Paradise Papers - Appleby', 'Paradise Papers - Barbados corporate registry', 'Bahamas Leaks', 'Panama Papers', 'Paradise Papers - Nevis corporate registry', 'Paradise Papers - Bahamas corporate registry', 'Offshore Leaks', 'Paradise Papers - Aruba corporate registry']
  - `internal_id`: STRING Example: "10001"
  - `registered_office`: STRING 
- **Officer**
  - `valid_until`: STRING Example: "The Panama Papers data is current through 2015"
  - `name`: STRING Example: "KIM SOO IN"
  - `sourceID`: STRING Example: "Panama Papers"
  - `icij_id`: STRING Example: "E72326DEA50F1A9C2876E112AAEB42BC"
  - `node_id`: INTEGER Min: 12000001, Max: 12000005
  - `lastEditTimestamp`: STRING Example: "1638311034062"
  - `country_codes`: STRING Example: "KOR"
  - `countries`: STRING Example: "South Korea"
  - `note`: STRING 
- **Address**
  - `original_address`: STRING Example: "ANNEX FREDERICK & SHIRLEY STS, P. O. BOX N-4805 NA"
  - `lastEditTimestamp`: STRING Example: "1638311020926"
  - `countries`: STRING Example: "Bahamas"
  - `address`: STRING Example: "ANNEX FREDERICK & SHIRLEY STS, P.O. BOX N-4805, NA"
  - `valid_until`: STRING Example: "The Bahamas Leaks data is current through early 20"
  - `icij_id`: STRING Example: "7C1AAD6896EFDED57D680B82E7ADF7AB"
  - `node_id`: INTEGER Min: 24000001, Max: 24000005
  - `sourceID`: STRING Example: "Bahamas Leaks"
  - `country_codes`: STRING Example: "BHS"
  - `name`: STRING 
  - `addressID`: STRING 
  - `country_code`: STRING 
  - `country`: STRING 
- **Other**
  - `lastEditTimestamp`: STRING Available options: ['1638311068329', '1638311074502', '1638311074946', '1638311075268', '1638311075503']
  - `incorporation_date`: STRING Example: "18-MAY-1983"
  - `struck_off_date`: STRING Example: "31-DEC-2002"
  - `jurisdiction`: STRING Available options: ['AW']
  - `jurisdiction_description`: STRING Available options: ['Aruba']
  - `valid_until`: STRING Available options: ['Aruba corporate registry data is current through 2', 'Appleby data is current through 2014']
  - `sourceID`: STRING Available options: ['Paradise Papers - Aruba corporate registry', 'Paradise Papers - Appleby']
  - `name`: STRING Example: "ANTAM ENTERPRISES N.V."
  - `type`: STRING Available options: ['LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY', 'SOLE OWNERSHIP', 'FOREIGN FORMED CORPORATION']
  - `node_id`: INTEGER Min: 80000012, Max: 85050056
  - `closed_date`: STRING Example: "28-NOV-2012"
  - `note`: STRING Available options: ['Closed date stands for Cancelled date.', 'Closed date stands for Liquidation date.']
  - `countries`: STRING Example: "Bermuda;Isle of Man"
  - `country_codes`: STRING Example: "BMU;IMN"
Relationship properties:
- **registered_address**
  - `link: STRING` Example: "registered address"
  - `sourceID: STRING` Example: "Panama Papers"
  - `valid_until: STRING` 
- **intermediary_of**
  - `valid_until: STRING` Example: "The Panama Papers data is current through 2015"
  - `sourceID: STRING` Example: "Panama Papers"
  - `link: STRING` Example: "intermediary of"
  - `end_date: STRING` 
  - `start_date: STRING` 
- **officer_of**
  - `link: STRING` Example: "shareholder of"
  - `valid_until: STRING` Example: "The Panama Papers data is current through 2015"
  - `sourceID: STRING` Example: "Panama Papers"
  - `start_date: STRING` Example: "19-NOV-1999"
  - `end_date: STRING` Example: "04-JUL-2000"
  - `status: STRING` 
- **similar**
  - `link: STRING` Example: "similar name and address as"
- **same_as**
  - `link: STRING` Available options: ['same name and registration date as', 'same address as', 'same as']
- **same_name_as**
  - `sourceID: STRING` Example: "Bahamas Leaks"
  - `link: STRING` Example: "same name as"
  - `valid_until: STRING` Example: "The Bahamas Leaks data is current through early 20"
- **same_company_as**
  - `valid_until: STRING` Example: "The Bahamas Leaks data is current through early 20"
  - `sourceID: STRING` Example: "Bahamas Leaks"
  - `link: STRING` Example: "same company as"
- **same_id_as**
  - `sourceID: STRING` Available options: ['Paradise Papers - Malta corporate registry']
  - `link: STRING` Available options: ['same id as']
  - `valid_until: STRING` Available options: ['Malta corporate registry data is current through 2']
- **connected_to**
  - `valid_until: STRING` Example: "Aruba corporate registry data is current through 2"
  - `link: STRING` Example: "connected to"
  - `sourceID: STRING` Example: "Paradise Papers - Aruba corporate registry"
The relationships:
(:Entity)-[:same_as]->(:Entity)
(:Entity)-[:registered_address]->(:Address)
(:Entity)-[:same_company_as]->(:Entity)
(:Entity)-[:same_name_as]->(:Other)
(:Entity)-[:same_name_as]->(:Entity)
(:Intermediary)-[:intermediary_of]->(:Entity)
(:Intermediary)-[:registered_address]->(:Address)
(:Intermediary)-[:officer_of]->(:Entity)
(:Intermediary)-[:similar]->(:Officer)
(:Intermediary)-[:same_name_as]->(:Intermediary)
(:Intermediary)-[:same_name_as]->(:Officer)
(:Intermediary)-[:same_as]->(:Officer)
(:Officer)-[:officer_of]->(:Entity)
(:Officer)-[:officer_of]->(:Other)
(:Officer)-[:registered_address]->(:Address)
(:Officer)-[:similar]->(:Officer)
(:Officer)-[:similar]->(:Intermediary)
(:Officer)-[:same_name_as]->(:Officer)
(:Officer)-[:connected_to]->(:Entity)
(:Officer)-[:same_id_as]->(:Officer)
(:Address)-[:same_as]->(:Address)
(:Other)-[:registered_address]->(:Address)
(:Other)-[:connected_to]->(:Entity)
(:Other)-[:same_name_as]->(:Entity)
(:Other)-[:same_name_as]->(:Officer)
(:Other)-[:same_name_as]->(:Other)
ground.cypher:
MATCH
  e1 = (:Entity {name: 'ANTAM ENTERPRISES N.V.', type: 'LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'}),
  e2 = (:Entity {name: 'ANTAM ENTERPRISES N.V.'}),
  i1 = (:Intermediary {name: 'ANTAM ENTERPRISES N.V.'}),
  o1 = (:Officer {name: 'ANTAM ENTERPRISES N.V.'}),
  a1 = (:Address {address: 'ANNEX FREDERICK & SHIRLEY STS, P.O. BOX N-4805, NA'}),
  oth1 = (:Other {name: 'ANTAM ENTERPRISES N.V.', type: 'LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'}),
  oth2 = (:Other {name: 'ANTAM ENTERPRISES N.V.'})
RETURN
  e1,
  e2,
  i1,
  o1,
  a1,
  oth1,
  oth2,
  [
    {r: e1 -[:same_as]-> e2, r: e2 -[:same_as]-> e1},
    {r: e1 -[:same_name_as]-> oth1, r: oth1 -[:same_name_as]-> e1},
    {r: e1 -[:same_name_as]-> e2, r: e2 -[:same_name_as]-> e1},
    {r: e1 -[:registered_address]-> a1},
    {r: e1 -[:same_company_as]-> e2, r: e2 -[:same_company_as]-> e1},
    {r: i1 -[:intermediary_of]-> e1},
    {r: i1 -[:officer_of]-> e1},
    {r: i1 -[:registered_address]-> a1},
    {r: o1 -[:officer_of]-> e1},
    {r: o1 -[:officer_of]-> oth1},
    {r: o1 -[:registered_address]-> a1},
    {r: oth1 -[:connected_to]-> e1},
    {r: oth1 -[:registered_address]-> a1},
    {r: oth2 -[:same_name_as]-> e1},
    {r: oth2 -[:same_name_as]-> oth1}
  ] LIMIT 20;

cypher: MATCH (e:Entity {name: 'ANTAM ENTERPRISES N.V.'})-[:same_as]->(e2:Entity),       (i:Intermediary {name: 'ANTAM ENTERPRISES N.V.'})-[:intermediary_of]->(e),       (o:Officer {name: 'ANTAM ENTERPRISES N.V.'})-[:officer_of]->(e),       (a:Address {address: 'ANNEX FREDERICK & SHIRLEY STS, P.O. BOX N-4805, NA'})-[:registered_address]->(e)\nRETURN e, e2, i, o, a
